title: RIP Claude Fable, open-source AI unleashed, full body avatars, new Google models, new TTS: AI NEWS
summary: AI news roundup covering recent releases including GLM 5.2, Kimi K2.7, MiniMax M3, new Google Gemini features, and various open-source research projects. The episode discusses text-to-speech, video generation, avatars, and agent systems alongside an analysis of Claude Fable's deprecation.
writeup: This AI Search roundup surveys a batch of recent model releases and research, including the open-source GLM 5.2, Kimi K2.7, and MiniMax M3, alongside new Google Gemini features. Coverage extends to text-to-speech, video generation, full body AI avatars, live translation, and multi-agent systems, with technical threads on test-time compute and sparse attention. The episode also analyzes the deprecation of Claude Fable, framing it against the wave of open-source alternatives.
